Figure 1:Per-parameter update magnitudes(Llama-3.1-8B / WMDP-bio).
Histograms oflog10⁡|Δ​w|\log_{10}|\Delta w|.(a)Global GA: diffuse, far belowδi\delta_{i}.(b)Surgical GA: concentrated on L14–16, still belowδi\delta_{i}.(c)Mansu: clamped at or aboveδi\delta_{i}by construction.
Dashed line: NF4 bin widthδi=8.4×10−4\delta_{i}=8.4\!\times\!10^{-4}; updates to
its left round to zero under 4-bit quantization, so onlyMansu’s
erasure survives (Lemma1).

Figure 2:Mansuthree-phase pipeline.Phase 1 (Localize): EAP-IG causal attribution identifies the minimal MLP circuit𝒞\mathcal{C}causally responsible for forget-set answers.Phase 2 (Project): Updates restricted to𝒞\mathcal{C}are projected into the null space of the circuit-restricted retain Fisher𝐅𝒞\mathbf{F}_{\mathcal{C}}(Theorem1).Phase 3 (Floor): A per-parameter magnitude floorδi\delta_{i}rescales each update to clear the nearest NF4 bin boundary by construction (Lemma1).

Figure 3:The four-property scorecard, decomposed.xx: forget
delta (all24=6×424=6{\times}4weight-edit method-dataset cells; LUNAR
excluded as inference-time redirection);yyvaries per panel:(a)ΔPTQ\Delta_{\mathrm{PTQ}},(b)MMLU loss,(c)AS-NC.
Bottom (green) is desired in all three. Marker colour = method,
shape = dataset;solid= passes all four thresholds
(F≥30%\geq\!30\%, Q≤0\leq\!0, R≤0.15\leq\!0.15, S≤0.30\leq\!0.30),hollow= fails at least one.Mansuis the only method
solid in every panel.
